surface.title: Auto Research Product Board
surface.subtitle: A public-safe Frontstage board for decentralized k-NN research.
surface.positioning: LoopX keeps autonomous research decentralized: every agent sees a claim-compatible frontier, while hypotheses, evidence, retries, and promotion decisions stay in the shared control plane.
surface.public_boundary: Public fixture and protected-evaluator outputs only; no raw logs, non-public source docs, credentials, local paths, or hidden leader transcript.

research_contract.objective: Improve exact k-nearest-neighbor inference speed while preserving exact neighbor identity.
research_contract.promotion_policy: Promote only after dev and holdout improvement, exact output, clean protected boundary, and no-upload evidence.

value_metrics.label: Held-out speedup
value_metrics.interpretation: The candidate still improves on the protected holdout split, so the result is not only a dev-set artifact.

value_metrics.label: Dev to holdout transfer
value_metrics.interpretation: The promotion candidate improves across both splits under the same protected metric.

value_metrics.label: Correctness preserved
value_metrics.interpretation: The speedup is only accepted because every query keeps exact nearest-neighbor identity.

value_metrics.label: Protected boundary
value_metrics.interpretation: The executor can optimize the candidate while the evaluator, data, oracle, and promotion gate stay protected.

lane_contract.anti_pattern: single leader agent owns the whole hypothesis tree

lanes.responsibility: Keep the research contract, protected scope, and public boundary clear.
lanes.does_not_own: Experiment execution or promotion by persuasion.

lanes.responsibility: Propose todo-linked hypotheses and parent-child refinements.
lanes.does_not_own: Novelty claims from the same material used for ideation.

lanes.responsibility: Run one claimed hypothesis in an isolated worktree and emit split-aware evidence.
lanes.does_not_own: Protected files, evaluator behavior, or promotion gates.

lanes.responsibility: Classify scored attempts into promote, retry, or retire using dev and holdout evidence.
lanes.does_not_own: Dev-only promotion or hidden bypass of user gates.

lanes.responsibility: Turn the evidence graph into a public showcase without leaking private material.
lanes.does_not_own: Changing public first screens without owner review.

selected.why_selected: Claim-compatible, unblocked, and directly tied to the current exact k-NN speedup objective.

runnable.next_action: Run dev evidence, then require holdout before promotion.

blocked.operator_value: Shows other-lane work without letting this agent silently steal it.
Keeps a useful negative direction visible so the next agent does not rediscover it.

nodes.summary: Vectorize exact distance work as the broad mechanism family.
nodes.evidence_boundary: Fixture evidence only; retained as a shape example.

nodes.summary: Use exact partial selection to avoid full distance sorting.
nodes.evidence_boundary: Runnable public pack evidence from protected_eval.py.

nodes.summary: Batch query work so shared array layout setup can be reused.
nodes.evidence_boundary: Claimed future lane; not promoted without split evidence.

nodes.summary: Approximate search is rejected unless exact identity can be preserved.
nodes.evidence_boundary: Negative evidence because correctness guardrail failed.

promotion_candidates.user_value: A reproducible speedup that survived the protected holdout gate.

retry_candidates.reason: Potential product value, but no dev or holdout score yet.

retirement_candidates.reason: Approximate search conflicts with exact output unless a later proof changes the boundary.

showcase_projection.title: Decentralized Auto Research: k-NN Speedup
showcase_projection.primary_claim: LoopX can present an Arbor-style research tree while keeping execution decentralized through todo claims, evidence events, and promotion gates.
showcase_projection.audience_takeaway: A user can inspect what is runnable now, what is blocked by another lane, what is promotable, and what has been retired without trusting a hidden leader chat.
showcase_projection.public_demo_path: Run the k-NN pack, emit evidence, append rollout events, then render this board from the evidence graph.
showcase_projection.next_product_step: Replace fixture-only nodes with live rollout-event projections for every auto-research run.

quality_gates: All promoted work needs dev and holdout evidence.
Protected scope edits fail the promotion gate.
Every hypothesis stays todo-linked and agent-scoped.
Negative evidence remains visible as reusable research memory.
Public boards render projections, not raw logs or private planning text.
